media_coverage.name: Specialized Media Coverage
media_coverage.description: Freezes all People relation changes at end of this round.

media_shielding.name: Media Shielding
media_shielding.description: Freezes all Military relation changes at end of this round.

media_blackout.name: Media Blackout
media_blackout.description: Freezes all Business relation changes at end of this round.

advisor_1.name: Junior Analyst
advisor_1.description: Replaces your nephew. Gives advice on laws, deals, and budget — mostly right.

advisor_2.name: Senior Analyst
advisor_2.description: Experienced economist. Advice is reliable, with appropriate caveats.

advisor_3.name: Chief Economic Advisor
advisor_3.description: Top of the field. Advice is specific, accurate, and slightly insufferable.

statue.name: Giant Statue
statue.description: Permanently increases your Charisma by +1. A monument to your glory appears in the city.
statue.full: The city cannot fit any more statues.
